text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here, with each student
determined to seek challenges and
self-improvement.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha, Ayabe! How do you intend to spend
this summer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My intimate and admirable camp rival, why don't
you and I partake in a little friendly competition?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We're not intimate... or any of that. You're simply
another opponent.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I plan on getting stronger, and come this
autumn... I will beat you. That is all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... Trainer, look at them bickering... as a
pair. I don't even come into the picture.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't get in their way. I should lay low. Lay...
low...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How you jest, Ayabe. I am of the belief that we
must be supportive in our competition, as
comrades of the same generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You, yours truly... and Doto. The three of us must
build each other up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't drag me into this. If you want someone to
go partner running with, then Doto should be
enough.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, Ayabe?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
They're acknowledging me! They're
acknowledging my presence! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, what are you doing? Come, we must
prepare for training at once!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ Hehehe!

I notice her tail wagging, presumably out of
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Doto, there's something by your feet. What
animal is that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, an animal?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there really is one. Is it a dog? Or is it... a
tanuki?

text_block_list.name: Tanuki
text_block_list.text: Yip! Yip!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm n-not sure why, but it's wagging its tail at me.
Oh no... Um...

It's a mystery as to why, but it looks like it's taken
a liking to her. We should make the most of this
summer, with our two rivals and new furry friend.
